this_title: Iain Banks - Raw Spirit: A Review Show Special
introduction: Iain Banks was one of Scotland's most popular and critically acclaimed novelists. In April 2013, he revealed he had terminal cancer, and was unlikely to live beyond a year. In what was to be his final television interview before his death on 9 June, he talks in depth to Kirsty Wark about his career, life and facing up to death.
chinese_title: Iain Banks - Raw Spirit: A Review Show Special
